indicators.name: large dining table
indicators.rationale: The large dining table occupies the entire floor space, leaving no unobstructed area for yoga or stretching.

indicators.name: chairs surrounding the table
indicators.rationale: The chairs are arranged around the table, further obstructing the floor space and making it impossible to deploy a yoga mat.

indicators.name: no open floor area
indicators.rationale: There is no unobstructed floor space available for yoga or stretching, as the table and chairs completely cover the floor.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the large dining table and chairs occupying the entire floor space, leaving no unobstructed area for practice.
